body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7573", "cvss": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "An authorization bypass (CWE-639) in the GetUserRoles gRPC API endpoint in Velocidex Velociraptor below version 0.76.5 allows any authenticated low-privilege user to retrieve the complete ACL policy (roles and permissions) for any user across all organizations by supplying targeted Name and Org parameters via a network request.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00255, "percentile": 0.16596}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3c93-g9g6-p5j4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T16:23:57Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3c93-g9g6-p5j4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3c93-g9g6-p5j4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7573"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T03:15:59Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T03:33:15Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7573", "https://docs.velociraptor.app/announcements/advisories/cve-2026-7573", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3c93-g9g6-p5j4"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Velocidex/velociraptor", "summary": "Velocidex Velociraptor has an authorization bypass vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T16:23:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3c93-g9g6-p5j4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.76.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.76.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Velocidex Velociraptor has an authorization bypass vulnerability
